title: Savory Crispy Vietnamese Bean Sprouts Noodles
description: Buttery and crispy Vietnamese dish featuring bean sprouts and tadka, whole30-friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of ghee over medium heat and add the sliced onion
Cook the onion for 5 minutes or until it is lightly browned and caramelized
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for an additional 1 minute
Add the bean sprouts to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes or until they are tender but still crisp
In a small bowl, whisk together the fish sauce, lime juice, salt, and black pepper
Pour the sauce over the bean sprouts and onions, and stir to combine
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the bean sprouts and sauce
Increase the heat to high and add the remaining 1 tablespoon of ghee to the skillet
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the noodles are crispy and golden brown
